title: eSouk Marketplace
description: A web-based marketplace for BIT Mesra students to buy and sell items like books, electronics, and academic projects within the campus community.

title: Productivity Dashboard
description: A modern and responsive productivity dashboard with real-time date & time, weather information, theme switching, to-do tools, daily planner, motivation section, and Pomodoro timer.

title: LV Website Clone
description: A Louis Vuitton inspired website clone project built as a frontend UI practice project.
